prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that works the way you do.

Headline: Meet Lumina — the smart desk lamp that syncs with your day.

From your first email to your last meeting, Lumina automatically tunes brightness and color temperature to match the time, your calendar, and the light in your room. No knobs, no fuss — just comfortable, focused light that keeps you in flow.

Built for remote work, Lumina reduces eye strain and boosts productivity with lighting that feels natural all day. It’s the desk upgrade that quietly makes everything better.

At $149, it’s the simplest way to bring smart, wellness-focused lighting to your workspace.

Email 1 — Announcement
Subject: Introducing Lumina: light that adapts to your workday

Hi [First Name],

Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp designed for the way you actually work. It automatically adjusts its brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your calendar, and the ambient light in your room.

That means no more harsh glare during late-night edits, and no more dim mornings that slow you down. Lumina delivers comfortable, focused light that helps you stay productive and feel better doing it.

Launch price: $149.

Ready to upgrade your desk?

[Shop Lumina]

— The Lumina Team


Email 2 — Benefits/Proof
Subject: Your desk lighting should do more than turn on

Hi [First Name],

Most desk lamps stop at “on.” Lumina goes further — it adapts in real time to help you work smarter.

• Syncs with your calendar to boost focus during meetings
• Warms up in the evening to reduce eye strain
• Balances with ambient light so your workspace always feels right

It’s the kind of upgrade you notice every day, especially during long hours at your desk.

Lumina is available now for $149.

[See Lumina in action]

— The Lumina Team


Email 3 — Social Proof/CTA
Subject: The light that “just works” — now shipping

Hi [First Name],

Remote workers told us the same thing: “I want great light without thinking about it.” That’s exactly what Lumina delivers.

It quietly adjusts throughout your day, so you can focus on work — not switches and settings. The result? A more comfortable, more productive workspace.

Lumina is shipping now at $149.

[Get Lumina]

— The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Your desk light should keep up with your calendar. Lumina adjusts brightness + color temp automatically for every meeting, task, and time of day. Smart light, zero fuss. $149. #remotework #productivity
2) Morning focus. Evening calm. Lumina tunes to your room’s light and your schedule so you don’t have to. Meet the lamp that just works. $149.

Instagram
1) Workdays change by the hour — your light should too. ✨
Lumina adapts to time of day, your calendar, and your room’s light for a workspace that feels right all day.

$149 • Smart desk lamp • Designed for remote work

#workspace #remotework #productivity #desksetup
2) Glow up your desk without lifting a finger.
Lumina automatically shifts from crisp daylight to warm evening light so your eyes stay comfortable.

Tap to shop • $149

#lightingdesign #wfh #wellness

LinkedIn
1) Announcing Lumina — a smart desk lamp built for modern remote work. It synchronizes with time of day, calendar events, and ambient light to deliver comfortable, focused lighting without manual adjustments. Now available for $149.
2) Productivity isn’t just about software. Lumina brings intelligent, adaptive lighting to your workspace, reducing eye strain and helping you stay in flow throughout the day. Launching now at $149.

Hero
Headline: Lumina — light that adapts to your workday
Subhead: A smart desk lamp that automatically tunes brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

Why Lumina
Designed for remote work, Lumina delivers comfortable, focused lighting that helps you stay productive and feel better all day. No more eye strain. No more manual adjustments.

Features
1) Time-of-day tuning
Crisp, energizing light in the morning. Warm, relaxing light at night.

2) Calendar-aware focus
Lumina brightens and cools during meetings and deep work to keep you sharp.

3) Ambient light balancing
Automatically adapts to your room’s lighting so your desk always feels just right.

4) Set it and forget it
Smart lighting that “just works,” without complicated setups or constant tweaking.

5) Built for modern desks
Minimal design that looks great in any workspace.

Testimonials
“[Customer testimonial placeholder]”
“[Customer testimonial placeholder]”
“[Customer testimonial placeholder]”

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to adjust?
Lumina uses time of day, your connected calendar, and a built-in ambient light sensor to automatically tune brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need an app to use it?
Initial setup uses the Lumina app, but daily adjustments are automatic. You can override settings anytime.

3) Will it work in a bright room?
Yes. Lumina balances its output with your room’s light to maintain comfortable, even illumination.

4) Is it good for video calls?
Absolutely. Lumina provides clear, flattering light that reduces harsh shadows and glare.

5) What’s the price and availability?
Lumina is available now for $149 and ships immediately.

6) Can I manually control it?
Yes. You can switch to manual mode any time to set your preferred brightness and color.

CTA
Ready for better light?
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Remote Workdays

SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, Year] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting, delivering comfortable, focused light without manual adjustments.

“Remote work has changed how we spend our days, but most desk lighting hasn’t kept up,” said [Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to make great light effortless — so people can stay productive and feel better throughout the day.”

Lumina’s adaptive lighting reduces eye strain and supports focus from morning to evening. With a minimal, modern design, it fits seamlessly into any workspace and offers an “it just works” experience tailored to busy schedules.

Key features include:
• Time-of-day tuning for energizing mornings and warm evenings
• Calendar-aware adjustments for meetings and deep-work sessions
• Ambient light balancing for consistent comfort

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting for modern work. Designed for remote professionals, Lumina products adapt to your environment and schedule so you can work comfortably, every day.

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]

steps.text:
All deliverables have been created and saved to their respective files:

- tagline.txt  
- hero-copy.txt  
- email-sequence.txt  
- social-posts.txt  
- landing-page.txt  
- press-release.txt  

Let me know if you want variations or refinements.
